description: Cross-language conformance for the ContentKind typed axis. The wire `type` string maps into a typed ContentKind, which classifies into a coarse ContentClass (video/live/audio) used to select per-kind ranking/parse/finish profiles. The mapping must be identical on every platform. Legacy Stremio tokens (movie/series/channel/tv) and the canonical snake_case kind names are accepted; anything else is unknown, which classifies as video (the frozen default) so no existing vector regresses.
